body:
This PR changes:
- Turbulent Prandtl number calculation in the stable case.
- The unstable case to be more physically consistent,
- Changes limiting by Richardson number `Ri_max = 0.25` to limiting by Prandtl number `Pr_max = 0.25`.

There might be some issues with the Julia registers. So in the interest of time I hardcoded the `Pr_max`. `ClimaParams@0.10.29` already has the new `Pr_max` parameter. So we should switch to using it when we can
title: Update turbulent Prandtl number
